title: Velvety Nostalgic Korean Beetroot Stir-fry
description: A spicy and velvety Korean dish featuring beetroot cooked in a vegetable stock cube with high-protein-friendly elements.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of water
ingredients.notes: For the vegetable stock cube mix

instructions: Boil the water and add the vegetable stock cube, bring to a boil then reduce heat. Simmer for about 5 minutes.
Peel and chop the beetroot into small pieces, adding them to the simmering broth along with garlic and red pepper flakes. Stir occasionally.
Once the beetroot is cooked through and has absorbed the flavors from the stock cube, add soy sauce for a savory twist. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Gently heat some oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped green onions to sauté lightly but do not burn them.
Distribute the cooked beetroot with its broth evenly on top of the sautéed green onions, garnishing as desired.
